questions.question: The street artist ---- on the mural for three weeks when the city council unexpectedly ---- the project, arguing it violated planning regulations.

feedback.hint: 'For three weeks when the council cancelled' → süreç + referans noktası. İptal anlık mı?
feedback.logic: Üç haftadır devam eden çalışma, iptalden önce → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been working'. İptal ani tamamlanmış eylem → Simple Past: 'cancelled'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'had worked' diyerek süreç vurgusunu kaybeder; 'for three weeks' süreklilik işaret eder → Continuous gerekli.

questions.question: Teenage reading habits ---- considerably since e-readers and audiobook platforms ---- accessible to a mass market.

feedback.hint: 'Since platforms became accessible' → başlangıç noktası. Okuma alışkanlıkları bugüne uzanıyor.
feedback.logic: 'Since + Simple Past (became)' başlangıç noktası. Bugüne uzanan evrim → Present Perfect: 'have evolved'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'have become' diyerek 'since' ardından Present Perfect kullanır; 'since' ile başlangıç noktası Simple Past olmalı — 'became' gerekli.

questions.question: By the time the gap year students return in September, most of them ---- in at least four countries and ---- their world view fundamentally.
options: A) will have lived / will have transformed
D) will have lived / will transform
E) will have been living / will have transformed

feedback.hint: 'By the time they return in September' → iki tamamlanmış gelecek eylem.
feedback.logic: 'By the time + Simple Present (return)' → Future Perfect: 'will have lived / will have transformed'. Her iki eylem de o noktaya kadar tamamlanmış.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'will have been living' diyerek FPC kullanır; 'in at least four countries' sayılabilir tekrar eden konaklama → Future Perfect daha uygun.

questions.question: Sports psychologists argue that elite athletes ---- not simply with physical conditioning but also with the mental discipline required ---- pressure under competition.

feedback.hint: Genel bilimsel argüman. 'Required to manage' → infinitive kalıbı.
feedback.logic: Spor psikologlarının genel argümanı → Simple Present: 'succeed'. 'The discipline required to manage pressure' → 'required + infinitive'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'are succeeding' diyerek Continuous kullanır; genel bilimsel görüş Continuous değil Simple Present gerektirir.

questions.question: The podcast ---- its first episode long before audio streaming platforms ---- widespread, yet it now boasts over two million loyal subscribers.

feedback.hint: 'Long before streaming became widespread' → podcast yayınlandı, ardından platformlar yaygınlaştı. Hangisi önce?
feedback.logic: Podcast yayınlandı platformlar yaygınlaşmadan önce → Past Perfect: 'had released'. Platformların yaygınlaşması referans noktası → Simple Past: 'became'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'released / had become' diyerek zamanları tersine çevirir; podcast daha önce yayınlandı — Past Perfect ilk eyleme ait.

questions.question: While the rest of the group ---- their final presentations, Maya quietly ---- her slides for the third time, convinced that perfectionism ---- more harm than good.
options: C) were rehearsing / was revising / does

feedback.hint: 'While the rest of the group were rehearsing' → eş zamanlı arka planlar. 'Perfectionism does more harm' → genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Were rehearsing' → grup Past Continuous. 'Was revising' → Maya da Past Continuous. 'Perfectionism does more harm' → genel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'rehearsed' diyerek grubu Simple Past yapar; 'while' eş zamanlılık → Past Continuous gerekli.

questions.question: The migration data ---- year on year since researchers ---- a more reliable tracking methodology in 2015.

feedback.hint: 'Since researchers adopted in 2015' → başlangıç noktası. Verinin iyileşmesi → bugüne uzanan süreç.
feedback.logic: 'Since + Simple Past (adopted in 2015)' → Present Perfect Continuous: 'has been improving' (yıl yıl devam eden iyileşme süreci).
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'has improved / has adopted' diyerek metodoloji benimsemesini Present Perfect yapar; '2015' belirli geçmiş → Simple Past 'adopted' gerekli.

questions.question: I ---- to apply for a summer internship for weeks, but every time I sit down to write the cover letter, I ---- that I ---- nothing truly impressive to include.
options: A) have been meaning / realise / have done
C) am meaning / realise / have done
D) have been meaning / realise / did

feedback.hint: 'For weeks' → süreç. 'Every time I sit down, I realise' → tekrar eden şimdiki. 'Nothing impressive' → bugüne kadar birikimsel sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Have been meaning' → haftalardır süren niyet. 'I realise' → tekrar eden şimdiki. 'Have done nothing impressive' → bugüne kadar → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'realise / did' diyerek 'nothing I did' kullanır; 'nothing I have done' → bugüne kadar yapılmamış → Present Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The climate summit ---- originally ---- for June, but organisers ---- the date to accommodate last-minute diplomatic negotiations.
options: B) has been / scheduled / have changed

feedback.hint: 'Originally scheduled for June' → geçmiş plan. Tarih değiştirildi → tamamlanmış geçmiş.
feedback.logic: 'Was originally scheduled for June' → Simple Past Passive. 'Organisers changed the date' → Simple Past (sonraki tamamlanmış eylem).
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'had been scheduled' diyerek Past Perfect kullanır; özel bir kronolojik öncelik yok — Simple Past yeterli.

questions.question: The philosopher's final manuscript, ---- in a private collection for over a century, ---- scholars with fresh insights into her radical ideas about consciousness.
options: B) having been held / has continued to provide
C) held / is continuing to provide
D) having held / continues to provide
E) being held / continues to provide

feedback.hint: 'Held in a private collection' → pasif participial. 'Continues to provide' → şimdiki süreç.
feedback.logic: 'Held in a private collection' → past participial (reduced passive relative). 'Continues to provide' → şimdiki devam eden gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'having been held' diyerek perfect participial kullanır; 'having been held for a century' kronolojik önceliği vurgular ama basit participial 'held' daha doğal ve sınav tercihidir.

questions.question: The exhibition hall ---- be accessed without a valid ticket; visitors ---- their passes at every checkpoint throughout the venue.
options: A) cannot / are required to show
D) may not / are required to show

feedback.hint: Erişim imkânsız → güçlü olumsuzluk. Biletleri gösterme → resmi zorunluluk (pasif dil).
feedback.logic: 'Cannot be accessed without a ticket' = kesin erişim imkânsızlığı. 'Are required to show' = resmi yükümlülük (daha kurumsal dil).
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'must show' diyerek çok doğrudan emirlik kullanır; 'are required to show' resmi kural dilinde daha tercih edilir.

questions.question: Given the ambiguous wording of the contract, the legal outcome ---- in the company's favour, but their lawyer ---- to guarantee anything at this stage.
options: A) may well be / is unable

feedback.hint: 'May well be' → güçlendirilmiş olasılık. 'Unable to guarantee' → kapasite yokluğu.
feedback.logic: 'May well be in the company's favour' = güçlendirilmiş olasılık (belirgin ihtimal). 'Is unable to guarantee' = garantileme kapasitesi yok.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'cannot' diyerek 'cannot guarantee' kullanır; 'unable to' ve 'cannot' yakın ama 'is unable to' daha profesyonel bağlamda — her ikisi kabul edilebilir, A daha akademik.

questions.question: You ---- so much energy trying to perfect every detail; sometimes, ---- something 'good enough' and moving forward is the more productive approach.
options: C) don't have to spend / accepting

feedback.hint: 'Needn't spend' → zorunluluk yok. 'Accepting something' → second part starts new topic — gerund as subject.
feedback.logic: 'Needn't spend' = zorunluluk yok (ve hâlâ yapılıyor). 'Accepting something and moving forward' → gerund subject.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'don't have to spend' diyerek zorunluluk yok anlamını verir; 'needn't' daha doğrudan ve vurgulu — her ikisi mümkün ama 'needn't' sınav tercihidir.

questions.question: The signal from the probe ---- intermittent since Thursday; engineers ---- a minor hardware malfunction in the transmission system.

feedback.hint: 'Since Thursday' → Present Perfect. 'Suspect' → stative verb.
feedback.logic: 'Has been intermittent since Thursday' → Present Perfect (since). 'Engineers suspect' → stative anlam → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'are suspecting' diyerek stative verb 'suspect'i Continuous yapılar; stative verbler Continuous kipinde kullanılmaz.

questions.question: The workshop participants ---- submit their creative work for group critique; participation in the review process is entirely voluntary.

feedback.hint: 'Entirely voluntary' → hiçbir yükümlülük yok. Hangi modal bu anlama en akademik şekilde karşılık verir?
feedback.logic: 'Are not obliged to submit' = akademik/resmi bağlamda yükümlülük yok — en uygun formal ifade.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'must not' diyerek kesin yasak bildirir; 'voluntary' zorunluluk yokluğunu ifade eder, yasak değil.

questions.question: The renovation ---- completed on schedule had the contractors ---- supply delays, a situation that ---- have been foreseen with better planning.
options: A) would have been / not encountered / could
B) would be / not encountered / could
C) would have been / not encountered / must
D) could have been / not encountered / should
E) would have been / encountered / could

feedback.hint: 'Had the contractors not encountered' → inverted Type 3. 'A situation that could have been foreseen' → geçmiş gerçekleşmemiş olasılık.
feedback.logic: 'Would have been completed' → Type 3 sonuç. 'Had the contractors not encountered' → inverted Past Perfect. 'Could have been foreseen' → geçmiş gerçekleşmemiş olasılık.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'must have been foreseen' diyerek güçlü geçmiş çıkarım kullanır; 'with better planning' olasılık içerir — 'could have' daha uygun.

questions.question: She ---- the part-time position when it was offered last spring; it ---- her the financial breathing room she so desperately needed.
options: A) should have taken / would have given
B) must have taken / would give
C) should take / would have given
D) ought to have taken / could give
E) should have taken / could have given

feedback.hint: Kısmi zamanlı iş teklifi reddedildi → geçmiş pişmanlık. Sonuç da gerçekleşmedi.
feedback.logic: 'Should have taken' = geçmişte yapılması gereken ama yapılmamış (pişmanlık). 'Would have given' = gerçekleşmemiş geçmiş sonuç → Type 3.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'could have given' diyerek 'olabilirdi' olasılığını kullanır; 'would have given' Type 3'teki mantıksal kesin sonucu daha güçlü ifade eder.

questions.question: The ancient site ---- undiscovered for centuries; nobody ---- the artifacts ---- beneath those particular ruins.
options: B) had lain / suspected / were buried
D) had been lying / suspected / had been buried
E) lay / suspected / had been buried

feedback.hint: Keşfedilmemiş alan → geçmiş durum. Şüphe duyulmadı → Simple Past. 'Were buried' → geçmiş pasif durum.
feedback.logic: 'Lay undiscovered for centuries' → Simple Past (durum). 'Nobody suspected artifacts were buried' → Simple Past + Simple Past Passive.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'had been lying' diyerek Past Perfect Continuous kullanır; alan gömülü kalması statik bir durum — Simple Past 'lay' daha uygun.

questions.question: Students ---- make use of the new collaborative workspace after six p.m. on weekdays; the building ---- monitored by security at all times.
options: C) are welcome to / is being
E) are welcome to / has been

feedback.hint: 'Are welcome to' → davet/izin. 'Is monitored' → süregelen güvenlik durumu.
feedback.logic: 'Are welcome to make use of' = nazik davet/izin bildirimi. 'Is monitored at all times' = stative durum → Simple Present Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'is being monitored' diyerek 'at all times' ile Continuous kullanır; 'at all times' kalıcı süregelen durum → Simple Present Passive daha doğal.

questions.question: The lights have been on in the office all night; the team ---- an emergency meeting, or someone ---- to turn them off when they left.
options: B) should be having / must have forgotten
C) must be having / must have forgotten
E) must be having / may have forgotten

feedback.hint: İki olası açıklama. Biri güçlü şimdiki çıkarım, diğeri zayıf geçmiş olasılık.
feedback.logic: 'Must be having an emergency meeting' = güçlü şimdiki çıkarım. 'May have forgotten to turn them off' = zayıf geçmiş olasılık.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'must have forgotten' diyerek güçlü geçmiş çıkarım kullanır; ancak iki açıklama yan yana geldiğinde ikincisi belirsiz alternatif olmalı → 'may have forgotten'.

questions.question: The young pianist ---- offered a scholarship to a prestigious conservatoire, an opportunity that ---- once in a generation.

feedback.hint: Burs → güncel haber. 'Comes once in a generation' → genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Has been offered a scholarship' → güncel → Present Perfect Passive. 'Comes once in a generation' → genel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'was / comes' diyerek burs teklifini Simple Past yapar; güncel haber → Present Perfect daha uygun.

questions.question: The historic archive ---- digitised in phases over the past five years, and the final collection ---- to the public by the end of this year.
options: A) has been / will be released
D) is being / will be released
E) has been / will have been released

feedback.hint: 'Over the past five years' → Present Perfect. 'By the end of this year' → gelecek.
feedback.logic: 'Has been digitised over the past five years' → Present Perfect Passive. 'Will be released to the public by the end of this year' → Simple Future Passive.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'will have been released' diyerek Future Perfect Passive kullanır; 'by the end of this year' tamamlanma vurgusunu işaret eder, ancak Simple Future de natural — A daha doğal.

questions.question: It ---- broadly ---- that extended screen exposure in early childhood ---- speech development, a claim that continues to generate debate among paediatricians.

feedback.hint: 'It is argued that' → impersonal passive. 'Delays speech development' → genel iddia.
feedback.logic: 'It is broadly argued that' = impersonal passive, genel tartışmalı iddia. 'Delays speech development' = genel iddia → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'is being argued' diyerek süregelen tartışmayı ifade eder; 'continues to generate debate' zaten bunu vurguluyor — 'is argued' genel impersonal yapı için daha standart.

questions.question: The athlete's doping violation ---- last month, and her world ranking ---- accordingly since the announcement.
options: D) had been confirmed / has dropped

feedback.hint: 'Last month' → geçmiş. 'Since the announcement' → bugüne uzanan sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Was confirmed last month' → Simple Past Passive. 'Has dropped since the announcement' → Present Perfect (since).
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'dropped' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; 'since the announcement' bugüne uzanıyor → Present Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The new community library ---- officially ---- tomorrow, and over two thousand residents ---- already ---- to attend the opening ceremony.
options: A) will be / opened / have / registered
B) is being / opened / are / registered
C) will be / opened / had / registered
D) is / opened / have / been registered
E) will be / opening / have / registered

feedback.hint: 'Tomorrow' → gelecek. 'Already registered' → bugüne kadar tamamlanmış. Pasif yapılar.
feedback.logic: 'Will be officially opened tomorrow' → Simple Future Passive. 'Over two thousand residents have already registered' → Present Perfect Active (aktif eylem).
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'is being opened' diyerek şu an devam eden açılışı işaret eder; açılış yarın — 'will be opened' gerekli.

questions.question: The novel ---- awarded the Booker Prize before it ---- translated into more than forty languages, reaching audiences in regions the author had never anticipated.

feedback.hint: Ödül verildi, SONRA kırk dile çevrildi. Hangisi önce?
feedback.logic: Ödül çeviri sürecinden önce → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been awarded'. Çeviri daha sonraki süreç → Simple Past Passive: 'was translated'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'was / had been' diyerek çeviriyi önce başlatır; ödül çeviriden önce geldi — Past Perfect ilk eyleme ait.

questions.question: All submitted artworks ---- carefully ---- by a panel of three judges, and the winner ---- at the closing gala next Friday.
options: A) are being / evaluated / will be announced
B) have been / evaluated / is announced
C) are being / evaluated / is announced
D) were / evaluated / will be announced
E) are / evaluated / will be announced

feedback.hint: 'Are being evaluated' → şu an devam ediyor. 'Next Friday' → gelecek.
feedback.logic: 'Are currently being carefully evaluated' → Present Continuous Passive. 'Will be announced at the closing gala next Friday' → Simple Future Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'is announced' diyerek Simple Present kullanır; kazanan gelecek Cuma açıklanacak — 'will be announced' gerekli.

questions.question: The university's student wellbeing centre ---- for refurbishment last term, but it ---- to the student body with new counselling facilities next month.
options: A) was closed / will be returned
B) has been closed / is returned
C) was closed / has been returned
D) had been closed / will be returned
E) was closed / would be returned

feedback.hint: 'Last term' → geçmiş. 'Next month' → gelecek plan.
feedback.logic: 'Was closed last term' → Simple Past Passive. 'Will be returned to the student body next month' → Simple Future Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has been returned' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; merkez henüz geri döndürülmedi, 'next month' planı → 'will be returned' gerekli.

questions.question: By 2035, it is predicted that the majority of entry-level administrative tasks ---- to artificial intelligence systems, fundamentally altering office work.

feedback.hint: 'By 2035' → gelecekte tamamlanmış. Pasif yapı.
feedback.logic: 'By 2035' → Future Perfect Passive: 'will have been outsourced'. O tarihe kadar tamamlanmış olacak.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'will be outsourced' diyerek Simple Future Passive kullanır; 'by 2035' tamamlanmışlık vurgular → Future Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The youth parliament debate ---- as one of the most productive in the organisation's history, and its resolutions ---- forwarded to national policymakers.
options: D) has been regarded / have been

feedback.hint: 'Is regarded' → şimdiki genel değerlendirme. 'Have been forwarded' → tamamlanmış güncel eylem.
feedback.logic: 'Is regarded as one of the most productive' → stative genel değerlendirme → Simple Present Passive. 'Have been forwarded' → tamamlanmış güncel → Present Perfect Passive.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'has been regarded' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; kalıcı genel değerlendirme → stative Simple Present Passive daha doğal.

questions.question: If teenagers ---- more financial literacy skills in school, they ---- better equipped to navigate the complexities of adult economic life.
options: B) had been taught / would be
D) were taught / would have been
E) had been taught / would have been

feedback.hint: Finansal okuryazarlık şu an okullarda öğretilmiyor → mevcut gerçekliğe karşı hipotez.
feedback.logic: Mevcut gerçekliğe karşı hipotez → Type 2: 'were taught / would be'. Şimdiki durum.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'had been taught / would be' diyerek Mixed Conditional kurar; bağlam tamamen şimdiki durum → Type 2 tutarlılığı gerektirir.

questions.question: I wish the city ---- more affordable arts venues; young creatives ---- forced to abandon their passion simply because rehearsal space ---- prohibitively expensive.
options: B) had / wouldn't have been / is

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + mevcut duruma pişmanlık. Sonuç şimdiki koşullu. Mekân pahalılığı genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Wish the city had' = mevcut duruma pişmanlık → Simple Past. 'Wouldn't be forced' = Type 2 şimdiki sonuç. 'Rehearsal space is prohibitively expensive' = genel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'wouldn't have been forced' diyerek Type 3 sonuç verir; 'young creatives' hâlâ bu sorunla yaşıyor → Type 2 'wouldn't be' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- the community not ---- its green spaces so aggressively in the 1990s, the neighbourhood ---- a very different character today.

feedback.hint: Inverted Type 3. '1990s' → geçmiş. 'Today' → şimdiki etki. Mixed mi?
feedback.logic: 'Had the community not commercialised' → Past Perfect inverted. 'Today' → Mixed: 'would have (a different character)' — şimdiki durumu ifade eder.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would' diyerek Type 2 sonuç verir; 'had commercialised' geçmişe sabitler → Mixed için 'would have' (noun olmadan) gerekir ama 'a different character today' → 'would have a different character' doğrudur.

questions.question: She wishes her mentor ---- her more directly about the pitfalls of the industry early on; the mistakes she ---- might have been avoided.

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık. 'The mistakes she made' → gerçekte yapılan hatalar → Simple Past.
feedback.logic: 'Wish mentor had warned' = geçmiş pişmanlık → Past Perfect. 'The mistakes she made' = gerçekte yapılan hatalar → Simple Past.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has made' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; yapılan hatalar geçmişte tamamlandı — Simple Past 'made' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- the investigative journalist ---- her identity throughout the inquiry, the whistleblower ---- never have come forward.
options: C) Had / not protected / would have
D) Were / not to protect / would

feedback.hint: Inverted Type 3. İhbarcı gelmedi → gerçekleşmemiş geçmiş.
feedback.logic: 'Had the journalist not protected her identity' → Past Perfect inverted. 'Would never have come forward' → Type 3 sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'would' diyerek Type 2 sonuç verir; 'had not protected' geçmişe sabitler → Type 3 'would have' gerekli.

questions.question: Suppose the school ---- a four-day week; some teachers ---- their workload more manageable while others ---- the reduced contact time with students.
options: A) adopted / would find / would resent
B) adopts / will find / will resent
C) had adopted / would have found / would have resented
D) were to adopt / would find / would resent

feedback.hint: 'Suppose' + 'were to adopt' → resmi gelecek hipotez. İki farklı sonuç, aynı Type 2 düzleminde.
feedback.logic: 'Were to adopt' = 'suppose' + formal hypothetical (Type 2). 'Would find / would resent' → Type 2 sonuçlar.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'adopted / would find / would resent' diyerek Type 2 kurar; bu da doğru, ancak 'suppose' + 'were to' daha resmi ve güçlü akademik yapı.

questions.question: If only the board ---- to the employees' repeated requests for flexible working arrangements; the resignation rate ---- considerably lower now.
options: C) had listened / would have been

feedback.hint: 'If only' + geçmiş pişmanlık. 'Now' → şimdiki etki. Mixed mi?
feedback.logic: 'If only the board had listened' → geçmiş pişmanlık → Past Perfect. 'Would be considerably lower now' → şimdiki etki → Mixed Conditional.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would have been' diyerek Type 3 sonuç verir; 'now' şimdiki anı işaret eder → Mixed, 'would be' gerekli.

questions.question: It is high time schools ---- teaching media literacy as an optional extra rather than ---- it as a core component of the curriculum.

feedback.hint: 'It is high time + ...' → Simple Past subjunctive. 'Rather than + ...' → gerund.
feedback.logic: 'It is high time + Simple Past': 'stopped'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'treating'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'stopped / to treat' diyerek 'rather than' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'rather than' edat → gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: Even if the app ---- a premium subscription model, most users ---- to pay for content they currently receive for free.
options: C) had introduced / would have been reluctant
D) were to introduce / would be reluctant
E) introduced / would have been reluctant

feedback.hint: 'Even if' → hipotetik senaryo. Şimdiki kullanıcılar şu an ücretsiz alıyor → mevcut gerçeklik bağlamı.
feedback.logic: 'Even if + Simple Past (introduced)' → hipotetik koşul. 'Would be reluctant' → Type 2 sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'will be reluctant' diyerek kesin gelecek kullanır; 'even if' hipotezini ortadan kaldırır — 'would be' koşullu sonuç gerekli.

questions.question: She deeply wishes she ---- such a promising collaborative project over a minor disagreement; the professional relationship ---- irreparably since.
options: A) hadn't abandoned / has been strained
B) didn't abandon / has been strained
C) hadn't abandoned / would have been strained
D) wouldn't have abandoned / has been strained

feedback.hint: 'Wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık. İlişki hasarı bugüne uzanıyor.
feedback.logic: 'Wish she hadn't abandoned' = geçmiş pişmanlık → Past Perfect. 'The relationship has been strained since' = geçmişten bugüne uzanan gerçek etki → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would have been strained' diyerek Type 3 sonuç verir; ilişki hasarı zaten yaşandı ve devam ediyor — Present Perfect 'has been strained' gerçeği aktarır.

questions.question: The jury urged ---- the defendant ---- all communication with the media and ---- any public statements until after the verdict.
options: A) that / avoid / refrain from making
B) that / avoids / refrains from making
D) that / avoided / refrained from making
E) that / avoid / to refrain from making

feedback.hint: 'Urged that' → subjunctive. İki paralel talep.
feedback.logic: 'Urge that + subjunctive': 'avoid / refrain from making'. Her iki eylem base form.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'to refrain' diyerek infinitive kullanır; subjunctive bağlamında 'refrain from making' base form gerektirir.

questions.question: The sociologist observed ---- prolonged social media use ---- not necessarily lead to social disconnection but ---- facilitate new forms of community formation.

feedback.hint: 'Observed that' → olgusal noun clause. 'Not necessarily... but can also' → bilimsel nüans bildirimi.
feedback.logic: 'Observed that prolonged use does not necessarily lead' → olgusal noun clause, Simple Present. 'But can also facilitate' → modal bilimsel bulgu.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'did / can also' diyerek backshift karışıklığı yaratır; 'observed' Simple Present gerçeği aktarıyor → backshift gerekmez.

questions.question: It is scarcely ---- that so little ---- about the long-term psychological impact of growing up entirely in the digital age.

feedback.hint: 'It is scarcely surprising that' → impersonal. 'So little is known' → genel durum.
feedback.logic: 'It is scarcely surprising that' = impersonal adjective clause. 'So little is known' = genel mevcut durum → Simple Present Passive.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'is being known' diyerek 'know' stative verb'ini Continuous yapılar; 'know' stative → Continuous kipinde kullanılmaz.

questions.question: The director told her lead actor ---- he ---- his performance too cautiously in previous rehearsals and that it ---- time he ---- more bold creative risks.
options: A) that / had been approaching / was / took
B) that / was approaching / is / takes
C) whether / had been approaching / was / took
D) that / approached / was / had taken
E) that / had been approaching / was / take

feedback.hint: 'Told that' → backshift. 'It was time he took' → 'it is time + Simple Past subjunctive' backshifted.
feedback.logic: 'Told that he had been approaching' → backshift: was approaching → had been approaching. 'It was time he took more risks' → 'it was time + Simple Past' (backshifted 'it is time + Simple Past').
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'take' diyerek subjunctive base form kullanır; 'it was time' backshifted → 'took' (Simple Past subjunctive) gerekli.

questions.question: ---- truly sets extraordinary performers apart from competent ones is not ---- they can do in ideal conditions but ---- they maintain composure when everything goes wrong.

feedback.hint: İlk: özne free relative. İkinci: 'not what they can do' → nesne noun clause. Üçüncü: 'how they maintain' → biçim.
feedback.logic: 'What sets them apart' = subject noun clause. 'Not what they can do' = nesne noun clause. 'But how they maintain composure' = 'how' biçim noun clause.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'how / how' diyerek ikinci boşluğa 'how' koyar; 'not how they can do things' değil 'not what they can do' nesne noun clause → 'what' gerekli.

questions.question: The careers adviser urged her students ---- the job market through several lenses and ---- hasty decisions based solely on starting salary.
options: A) to evaluate / not to make

feedback.hint: 'Urge + object + infinitive'. Paralel olumsuz infinitive.
feedback.logic: 'Urge + object + infinitive': 'to evaluate'. Paralel olumsuz: 'not to make'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'not making' diyerek gerund kullanır; paralel yapı için 'not to make' infinitive gerektirir.

questions.question: The welfare report concluded ---- many young carers ---- invisible to support services and ---- their emotional needs ---- largely unaddressed for years.
options: A) that / had remained / that / had gone
C) whether / had remained / whether / had gone
D) that / had remained / and / had gone
E) that / remained / and / had gone

feedback.hint: 'Concluded that' → noun clause. 'Had remained / had gone' → geçmiş birikimsel durumlar. Her iki noun clause 'that' ile.
feedback.logic: 'Concluded that many had remained invisible' + 'that their needs had gone unaddressed for years' → past Perfect iki durumu. Her iki noun clause 'that' ile.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'and / had gone' diyerek ikinci noun clause'dan 'that'ı düşürür; paralel noun clause yapısında 'that' tekrarı tutarlılık sağlar.

questions.question: Nobody ---- exactly ---- the tradition of leaving stones on gravestones ---- but theories range from ancient protective rituals to simple markers of visitation.

feedback.hint: Gelenek nerede başladı → 'where' (köken yeri). Geçmişte başladı → Simple Past.
feedback.logic: 'Nobody knows where the tradition originated' → 'where' köken yeri dolaylı sorusu. 'Originated' → Simple Past.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'when' diyerek zaman sorusu kurar; cümle geleneğin kökenini anlatıyor, zaman değil yer — 'where' daha uygun.

questions.question: The sports coach recommended ---- each player ---- their personal recovery routine and ---- the team nutritionist twice a week.

feedback.hint: 'Recommended that' → subjunctive. Paralel base form.
feedback.logic: 'Recommend that + subjunctive': 'individualise / consult'. Her iki eylem paralel base form.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'individualises / consults' diyerek üçüncü tekil kişi -s eki kullanır; subjunctive yapısında -s eki kullanılmaz.

questions.question: The exhibition's curatorial notes clarified ---- the works ---- not in strict chronological order ---- according to thematic resonances that cut across different eras.

feedback.hint: 'Clarified that' → backshift. 'Not in order... but according to' → 'not X but Y' doğrultma.
feedback.logic: 'Clarified that works were arranged' → backshift. 'Not in chronological order but according to thematic resonances' → 'not X but Y' yapısı.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'rather' diyerek 'not X rather Y' kurar; 'not X but Y' paralel doğrultma yapısı için 'but' gerekli.

questions.question: The school counsellor advised students ---- comparing their academic journeys to others' and instead ---- their own progress as the only meaningful benchmark.

feedback.hint: 'Advise + object + ...' yapısı. Paralel infinitive yapısı.
feedback.logic: 'Advise + object + infinitive': 'to stop'. Paralel: 'and to use' → 'and instead to use' → 'and to use'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to stop / using' diyerek paralel yapıyı bozar; 'and instead using' — ikinci boşluk da 'to use' infinitive olmalı.

questions.question: The youth film club values ---- sessions where members ---- their own interpretations freely without ---- judged by others.
options: B) to host / share / to be
C) hosting / can share / to be
E) to host / can share / being

feedback.hint: 'Value + ...' yapısı. 'Where members can share' → relative clause içi. 'Without + ...' → edat.
feedback.logic: 'Value + gerund': 'hosting'. 'Where members can share freely' → relative clause, modal. 'Without + gerund': 'being judged'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'sharing' diyerek relative clause'da modal olmadan 'sharing' kullanır; 'can share' modal + verb relative clause içinde — 'sharing' yanlış yapı.

questions.question: The entrepreneur admitted ---- the market research phase in her rush to launch, ---- the product's early failure.
options: C) having skipped / to contribute to
E) having skipped / having contributed to

feedback.hint: 'Admit + ...' → geçmiş itiraf. İkinci boşluk: eş zamanlı katkı — participial.
feedback.logic: 'Admitted having skipped' = perfect gerund (geçmiş eylem itirafı). 'Contributing to the product's early failure' → eş zamanlı sonuç participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'skipping' diyerek basit gerund kullanır; 'admit + having done' geçmişteki eylemi daha güçlü ifade eder — perfect gerund daha uygun.

questions.question: It is absolutely pointless ---- for perfection in creative work ---- the iterative process of revision and failure, since mastery ---- from repeated effort.
options: B) to wait / without embracing / emerges
C) waiting / without to embrace / emerges
D) to wait / without embracing / has emerged

feedback.hint: 'Pointless + ...' yapısı. 'Without + ...' → edat. 'Mastery emerges' → genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Pointless + gerund': 'waiting'. 'Without + gerund': 'embracing'. 'Mastery emerges from repeated effort' → genel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'to wait' diyerek 'pointless + infinitive' kullanır; 'it is pointless + gerund' sabit yapı — 'waiting' gerekli.

questions.question: She managed ---- an internship at a leading design agency despite ---- rejected by three others, demonstrating remarkable resilience.
options: E) to secure / to have been

feedback.hint: 'Manage + ...' yapısı. 'Despite + ...' → edat. Üç kez reddedilme önce gerçekleşti.
feedback.logic: 'Manage + infinitive': 'to secure'. 'Despite + gerund': 'having been rejected' — üç kez reddedilme stajdan önce → perfect gerund.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'being rejected' diyerek basit gerund kullanır; reddedilme stajı güvenceden önce tamamlandı → perfect gerund 'having been rejected' daha güçlü.

questions.question: The digital detox workshop encouraged participants ---- their phone usage patterns before ---- to set realistic boundaries, ---- that awareness precedes lasting change.
options: C) to audit / to attempt / to argue
E) to audit / attempting / to argue

feedback.hint: 'Encourage + object + ...' yapısı. 'Before + ...' → edat. 'Arguing that' → eş zamanlı argüman.
feedback.logic: 'Encourage + object + infinitive': 'to audit'. 'Before + gerund': 'attempting'. 'Arguing that awareness precedes change' → eş zamanlı argüman participial.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'to argue' diyerek infinitive kullanır; 'arguing' participial eş zamanlılığı ifade eder — 'to argue' amaç bildirir.

questions.question: The novelist spent eighteen months ---- the most authentic narrative voice for her protagonist, only ---- that the entire story worked better in third person.
options: D) to search for / to discover
E) searching for / to have discovered

feedback.hint: 'Spend time + ...' yapısı. 'Only to + infinitive' → beklenmedik hayal kırıklığı.
feedback.logic: 'Spent + gerund': 'searching for'. 'Only to discover' → beklenmedik sonuç deyimsel yapı.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'discovering' diyerek 'only to discover' yerine gerund kullanır; 'only to + infinitive' deyimsel yapı — gerund bu anlamı taşımaz.

questions.question: The campaign is dedicated to ---- young people's civic engagement and ---- that voting is not merely a right but a shared responsibility.

feedback.hint: 'Be dedicated to + ...' yapısı. Paralel gerund.
feedback.logic: 'Dedicated to + gerund': 'fostering / demonstrating'. 'To' edat tamlaması her iki eylem için gerund gerektirir.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'fostering / to demonstrate' diyerek paralel yapıyı bozar; 'dedicated to' edat tamlaması her iki eylem için de gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: Most aspiring writers tend ---- feedback as a personal attack rather than ---- it as a tool for developing their craft.

feedback.hint: 'Tend + ...' yapısı. 'Rather than + ...' → gerund.
feedback.logic: 'Tend + infinitive': 'to perceive'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'embracing'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to perceive / to embrace' diyerek 'rather than' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'rather than' edat → gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: He later acknowledged ---- more attention to his mentor's early advice about the importance of ---- strategic alliances in a competitive industry.
options: C) to have paid / to build

feedback.hint: 'Acknowledge + ...' yapısı. 'Importance of + ...' → edat tamlaması.
feedback.logic: 'Acknowledge + gerund / perfect gerund': 'having paid' (daha önce dikkat etmesi gerekirdi — geçmiş). 'Importance of + gerund': 'building'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'paying' diyerek basit gerund kullanır; mentorun tavsiyesine dikkat etmek geçmişe ait → 'having paid' geçmiş önceliği vurgular.

questions.question: The conservatoire, ---- alumni include some of the most celebrated musicians of the past century, has just launched a new scholarship for students from low-income backgrounds.

feedback.hint: 'Konservatuarın mezunları' → iyelik. Non-defining bağlam.
feedback.logic: 'Whose alumni include' → iyelik. Non-defining (virgüllü) → 'that' kullanılamaz.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'who's' diyerek 'who is/has' kısaltmasını iyelik sıfatı olarak kullanır — 'whose' iyelik, 'who's' kısaltma.

questions.question: The reason ---- many teenagers find it difficult to ask for help is the pervasive belief ---- vulnerability ---- a sign of weakness.

feedback.hint: 'The reason why' → relative adverb. 'The belief that' → appositive noun clause.
feedback.logic: 'The reason why they find it difficult' → zarflık: 'why'. 'The pervasive belief that vulnerability is a sign of weakness' → appositive noun clause: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'that' diyerek 'the reason that' kullanır; dilbilgisel mümkün ama 'the reason why' daha standart — sınav tercihidir.

questions.question: The environmental campaign, ---- social media reach has grown exponentially this year, ---- managed to gather over a million signatures in under a week.
options: E) the reach of which / has

feedback.hint: 'Kampanyanın sosyal medya erişimi' → iyelik. Özne tekil mi?
feedback.logic: 'Whose social media reach has grown' → iyelik. 'The campaign' tekil → 'has managed'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'have' diyerek plural fiil kullanır; 'the campaign' tekil → 'has' gerekli.

questions.question: The community garden project, with ---- over two hundred volunteers ---- been involved since its inception, has transformed a derelict site into a vibrant green space.

feedback.hint: 'With which volunteers have been involved' → preposition + which. Gönüllüler çoğul.
feedback.logic: 'With which over two hundred volunteers have been involved' → preposition + 'which' (project). 'Over two hundred volunteers' → plural → 'have been involved'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has' diyerek singular fiil kullanır; 'over two hundred volunteers' plural özne → 'have' gerekli.

questions.question: There are very few languages in the world ---- gender is not encoded in some way, ---- challenges the assumption that gendered language is an inevitable feature of human communication.

feedback.hint: 'Languages in which gender is not encoded' → formal yer zarflığı. İkinci: tüm cümleye atıf.
feedback.logic: 'Languages in which gender is not encoded' → 'in which' formal. İkinci boşluk: önceki tüm fikre atıf → non-defining → 'which'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'that' diyerek non-defining bağlamda kullanım hatası yapar; virgüllü non-defining clause 'that' alamaz.

questions.question: She is widely regarded as one of the few politicians ---- rhetoric consistently prioritises long-term sustainability over short-term popularity.

feedback.hint: 'Politikacının söylemi' → iyelik. Defining bağlam.
feedback.logic: 'Politicians whose rhetoric consistently prioritises' → iyelik: 'whose'. Defining relative clause.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'that' diyerek 'rhetoric consistently prioritises' → 'that rhetoric' özne relative kurar; 'that' ile iyelik ifade edilemez — 'whose' gerekli.

questions.question: The internship ---- she has spoken so passionately involves working with ---- are considered the most promising young engineers in the country.

feedback.hint: 'Spoken about' → preposition. 'Those who are considered' → kişiler free relative.
feedback.logic: 'The internship about which she has spoken' → 'speak about + object' → 'about which'. 'Working with those who are considered' → 'those who' kişiler.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'which / those that' diyerek 'preposition'suz 'which' kullanır; 'speak about' bağımlı preposition → 'about which' zorunlu.

questions.question: The student won four competitions in a single term, ---- is an achievement ---- even the most experienced teachers in the school had not seen before.

feedback.hint: İlk: tüm cümleye atıf → non-defining. İkinci: 'an achievement that' → defining object.
feedback.logic: Dört yarışma kazanmak → tüm cümleye atıf → non-defining: 'which'. 'An achievement that even experienced teachers had not seen' → defining object: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'which / which' diyerek ikinci boşluğa 'which' koyar; defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart.

questions.question: ---- we choose to consume on social media shapes not only our beliefs but also the kind of ---- we perceive as normal.

feedback.hint: İlk: özne noun clause. 'The kind of behaviour we perceive' → 'behaviour' sayılamaz.
feedback.logic: 'What we choose to consume' = subject noun clause. 'The kind of behaviour we perceive as normal' → 'behaviour' uncountable → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'the behaviour' diyerek belirli artikel kullanır; genel 'behaviour we perceive as normal' → article yok.

questions.question: The new policy targets the most vulnerable communities, the members ---- have historically ---- the least access to mental health support.

feedback.hint: 'Members of communities' → partitive. 'Communities' → kişilerden oluşuyor → 'whom'. 'Have historically had' → Present Perfect.
feedback.logic: 'The members of whom have historically had' → partitive + kişiler → 'of whom'. 'Have had the least access' → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'of which / had' diyerek 'of which' kullanır; 'communities' kişilerden oluştuğundan 'of whom' daha doğal; ayrıca 'had' Simple Past — 'have had' Present Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: ---- gap between ---- aspiration and ---- reality can be ---- source of immense frustration or, alternatively, ---- powerful motivator.
options: B) A / the / the / a / a
D) The / an / a / a / a

feedback.hint: 'The gap between' → belirli. 'Aspiration / reality' → soyut genel. 'A source / a powerful motivator' → ilk kez.
feedback.logic: 'The gap between aspiration and reality' → belirli + soyut genel. 'A source of frustration / a powerful motivator' → belirsiz tekil → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'the reality' diyerek soyut genel 'reality'e 'the' koyar; genel soyut kavram → article yok.

questions.question: ---- majority of ---- feedback received from ---- participants was constructive, with ---- notable exception being ---- comment about ---- duration of ---- activities.
options: A) The / the / - / one / a / the / the
B) A / the / the / a / the / a / the
C) The / - / the / one / a / the / -
D) The / the / - / a / a / a / the

feedback.hint: 'The majority of the feedback received' → belirli. 'Participants' → genel. 'A notable exception' → ilk kez. 'A comment' → ilk kez. 'The duration of the activities' → belirli.
feedback.logic: 'The majority of the feedback received from participants' → belirli + genel. 'A notable exception' → 'a'. 'A comment about the duration of the activities' → 'a' + 'the' + 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'one notable exception' diyerek 'one' zamir kullanır; 'a notable exception' belirsiz tekil için daha doğal.

questions.question: ---- sense of ---- belonging that young people derive from ---- group activities is essential for ---- healthy psychological development during ---- adolescence.

feedback.hint: 'A sense of belonging' → belirsiz. 'Group activities' → genel. 'Healthy psychological development / adolescence' → soyut genel.
feedback.logic: 'A sense of belonging that young people derive' → belirsiz 'a'. 'Group activities' → genel → article yok. 'Healthy psychological development / adolescence' → soyut genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'The sense / the group activities' diyerek sıfat tamlaması yokken 'the' kullanır; sıfat tamlaması olmadan belirsiz başlangıç → 'a sense'.

questions.question: ---- news that ---- local independent cinema had secured ---- major funding grant came as ---- enormous relief to ---- community it serves.
options: A) The / the / a / an / the
B) A / the / the / a / the
C) The / a / a / an / the

feedback.hint: 'The news that' → belirli (sıfat tamlaması). 'The local cinema' → belirli. 'A major funding grant' → ilk kez. 'An enormous relief' → ünlü. 'The community it serves' → sıfat tamlaması.
feedback.logic: 'The news that the local cinema had secured' → 'the' + sıfat tamlaması. 'A major funding grant' → belirsiz. 'An enormous relief' → 'e' ünlü → 'an'. 'The community it serves' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'a local cinema' diyerek belirsiz kullanır; 'the local independent cinema' önceden bilinen belirli kurum → 'the'.

questions.question: ---- fact remains that ---- access to quality arts education ---- one of ---- most effective ways to nurture ---- creativity in young people.

feedback.hint: 'The fact remains' → sabit deyim. 'Access to quality arts education' → genel. 'The most effective ways' → superlative. 'Creativity' → soyut genel.
feedback.logic: 'The fact remains' → sabit deyim + 'the'. 'Access to quality arts education' → genel → article yok. 'The most effective ways' → superlative → 'the'. 'Creativity' → soyut genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'remain' diyerek plural fiil kullanır; 'the fact remains' tekil → 'remains' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- recent study found that ---- students who engaged in ---- regular peer mentoring showed ---- notable improvement in both ---- confidence and ---- academic performance.
options: B) The / the / a / the / the / the

feedback.hint: 'A recent study' → ilk kez. 'Students who engaged' → genel. 'Regular peer mentoring' → genel. 'A notable improvement' → ilk kez. 'Confidence / academic performance' → soyut genel.
feedback.logic: 'A recent study' → ilk kez → 'a'. 'Students who engaged in regular peer mentoring' → genel → article yok. 'A notable improvement' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'Confidence / academic performance' → soyut genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı tüm boşluklara 'the' koyar; genel öğrenciler ve soyut kavramlar → article yok.

questions.question: ---- capacity of ---- human brain to rewire itself through ---- experience, ---- process known as neuroplasticity, represents ---- profound challenge to ---- deterministic models of intelligence.
options: B) A / the / the / a / the / the
C) The / the / the / a / a / -

feedback.hint: 'The capacity of the human brain' → belirli. 'Experience' → genel. 'A process known as' → belirsiz appositive. 'A profound challenge' → ilk kez. 'Deterministic models' → genel.
feedback.logic: 'The capacity of the human brain' → belirli. 'Through experience' → genel → article yok. 'A process known as neuroplasticity' → belirsiz appositive → 'a'. 'A profound challenge' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'Deterministic models' → genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'through the experience' diyerek genel 'experience'a 'the' koyar; genel deneyim kavramı → article yok.

questions.question: It took ---- extraordinary level of courage for ---- young activist to stand before ---- crowd of ten thousand people and deliver ---- speech that ---- few could have written.

feedback.hint: 'An extraordinary level' → ünlü. 'The young activist' → belirli. 'A crowd' → ilk kez. 'A speech that few could' → ilk kez. Son boşluk 'few could have written' → pronoun, article yok.
feedback.logic: 'An extraordinary level' → 'e' ünlü → 'an'. 'The young activist' → belirli (daha önce atıf). 'A crowd of ten thousand' → belirsiz. 'A speech that few could have written' → belirsiz.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'the extraordinary level' diyerek önceden bahsedilmemiş seviyeye 'the' koyar; ilk kez bahsedilen → 'an' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- growing consensus among ---- researchers is that ---- meaningful digital citizenship education must address ---- ethics, ---- privacy, and ---- critical evaluation of sources.
options: B) The / the / a / the / the / the

feedback.hint: 'A growing consensus' → ilk kez. 'Researchers' → genel. 'Meaningful digital citizenship education / ethics / privacy / critical evaluation' → genel soyut.
feedback.logic: 'A growing consensus among researchers' → 'a' + genel. Soyut genel: 'meaningful education / ethics / privacy / critical evaluation' → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'The growing consensus' diyerek belirli kullanır; daha önce bahsedilmemiş → 'a' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- physical and ---- emotional demands of ---- elite-level training are ---- formidable combination that ---- few young athletes fully appreciate until they are ---- midst of it.
options: B) The / the / the / a / - / the

feedback.hint: 'The physical and emotional demands' → belirli (paralel sıfat tamlaması). 'Elite-level training' → genel. 'A formidable combination' → ilk kez. 'Few' → zamir (article yok). 'In the midst of it' → sabit deyim.
feedback.logic: 'The physical and emotional demands' → belirli sıfat tamlaması. 'Elite-level training' → genel → article yok. 'A formidable combination' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'The midst of it' → sabit deyim → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'the / the / the / a' diyerek 'the elite-level training' kullanır; genel eğitim türü → article yok.

questions.question: ---- the initial scepticism of several board members, the proposal was adopted unanimously, ---- representing a turning point in the organisation's approach to youth engagement.

feedback.hint: 'Scepticism' → isim öbeği. 'Thereby representing' → participial sonuç bildirimi.
feedback.logic: 'Notwithstanding the initial scepticism' → resmi edat + isim öbeği. 'Thereby representing a turning point' → eylemin sonucu participial.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'thus' diyerek 'thus representing' kullanır; 'thus' ve 'thereby' her ikisi de sonuç bildirir ama 'thereby + gerund' participial yapıyla daha standart.

questions.question: The youth literacy initiative has benefited ---- from sustained government backing ---- from the enthusiasm of local volunteer networks, ---- underscoring the value of public-private collaboration.
options: A) not only / but also / thereby
C) not only / but also / consequently

feedback.hint: 'Not only... but also' → paralel. 'Thereby underscoring' → eylemin mantıksal sonucu.
feedback.logic: 'Not only from government backing but also from volunteer networks' → paralel. 'Thereby underscoring the value of collaboration' → eylemin sonucu participial.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'consequently' diyerek tam cümle başlatır; 'underscoring' participial phrase — 'thereby' participial ile uyumlu, 'consequently' değil.

questions.question: The student body's response to the new policy was ---- positive ---- the principal felt vindicated in having pushed for it ---- the resistance from certain staff members.

feedback.hint: 'So + adj + that' yapısı. 'Despite + noun phrase' → isim öbeği.
feedback.logic: 'So positive that the principal felt vindicated' → 'so + adj + that'. 'Despite the resistance' → edat + isim öbeği.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'although' diyerek tam cümle bağlacı kullanır; 'the resistance from certain staff members' isim öbeği → 'despite' edat gerektirir.

questions.question: The exhibition ---- celebrated indigenous art ---- raised critical questions about cultural appropriation; ----, it transformed a formerly contentious debate into a constructive dialogue.
options: A) not only / but also / in doing so
C) not only / but also / thereby
D) either / or / in doing so
E) not only / but also / moreover

feedback.hint: 'Not only... but also' → paralel. 'In doing so' → 'bu eylemi gerçekleştirirken'. Noktalı virgül sonrası özel eylem atfı.
feedback.logic: 'Not only celebrated... but also raised' → paralel. 'In doing so, it transformed' = 'bu eylemi yaparak' → spesifik eyleme geri atıf.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'thereby' diyerek 'thereby, it transformed' kurar; 'thereby' participial phrase ile kullanılır, başlı başına cümle açmaz — 'in doing so' tam cümle açabilir.

questions.question: ---- access to nutritious food is widely recognised as essential for cognitive development, ---- lack of ---- such access ---- disproportionately affects children from lower socioeconomic backgrounds.

feedback.hint: 'While' → kısmi zıtlık + tam cümle. 'The lack of such access' → belirli. 'Still disproportionately affects' → hâlâ devam eden sorun.
feedback.logic: 'While access is recognised' → kısmi zıtlık. 'The lack of such access still disproportionately affects' → 'the' + 'still' (devam).
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'yet' diyerek 'yet disproportionately affects' kullanır; 'still' süregliliği daha doğal ifade eder — 'yet' genellikle cümle başında zıtlık zarfı.

questions.question: The workshop facilitator spoke plainly ---- passionately, ---- her audience precisely because she refused to oversimplify ---- condescend to them.

feedback.hint: 'Plainly yet passionately' → zıt iki sıfat. 'Engaging her audience' → participial. 'Refused to... or to...' → paralel.
feedback.logic: 'Plainly yet passionately' → zıt özellikler. 'Engaging her audience' → eş zamanlı participial. 'Refused to oversimplify or condescend' → paralel 'or'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'nor' diyerek 'refused to oversimplify nor condescend' kurar; 'nor' yerine 'or' after 'refused to' daha doğal — 'neither... nor' tam yapısı gerektirir.

questions.question: The creative writing tutor argued that authentic storytelling ---- demands technical skill ---- requires the writer to draw on experiences ---- cannot be taught in a classroom.
options: A) not only / but also / that
C) not only / but also / which
E) not only / but also / those

feedback.hint: 'Not only... but also' → paralel. 'Experiences that cannot be taught' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'Not only demands technical skill but also requires the writer to draw' → paralel. 'Experiences that cannot be taught' → defining: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'which' diyerek defining bağlamda 'which cannot be taught' kullanır; defining relative clause için 'that' daha standart.

questions.question: The mentorship programme has proven its value; ----, participants have consistently reported improvements in both ---- professional confidence and ---- personal resilience.

feedback.hint: Noktalı virgül + pekiştirme. 'Both professional confidence and personal resilience' → soyut genel paralel.
feedback.logic: 'Indeed' → pekiştirme/doğrulama zarfı. 'Professional confidence / personal resilience' → soyut genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'moreover' diyerek ek bilgi bildirir; 'indeed' önceki iddiayı kanıtlayan bilgiyi pekiştirir — burada daha uygun.

questions.question: ---- to public opinion surveys, teenagers ---- want ---- safe digital spaces ---- authentic engagement; they are weary of platforms optimised purely for engagement metrics.
options: A) According / primarily / not just / but also
B) Due / primarily / not only / but
D) Based / primarily / not just / but also
E) According / largely / not just / but also

feedback.hint: 'According to surveys' → sabit deyim. 'Not just X but also Y' → doğrultma.
feedback.logic: 'According to public opinion surveys' → sabit deyim. 'Not just safe digital spaces but also authentic engagement' → doğrultma.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'Based' diyerek 'Based to surveys' kurar; 'based on' değil 'based to' — 'according to' doğru sabit deyim.

questions.question: The climate activist gave a speech ---- was both technically rigorous ---- emotionally compelling, ---- that data and empathy need not be opposing forces.
options: E) that / as well as / demonstrating

feedback.hint: 'A speech that was' → defining. 'Both... and' → paralel. 'Demonstrating that' → participial sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'A speech that was both technically rigorous and emotionally compelling' → defining + 'both... and'. 'Demonstrating that data and empathy need not be opposing forces' → eylemin sonucu participial.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'which' diyerek defining bağlamda 'which was' kullanır; 'a speech which was' da mümkün ama 'a speech that was' defining için daha standart sınav tercihi.
